chunks.text: Directions to Cory and Soda Hall Directions to Cory and Soda Hall Cory Hall (EE) is on the corner of Hearst Ave and Gayley Ave. Soda Hall (CS) is on the corner of Hearst Ave and LeRoy Ave (about 1/2 block west of Cory Hall). UC Berkeley campus map By

lock west of Cory Hall). UC Berkeley campus map By mass transit: take BART to the Berkeley Main station walk to the northeast corner of Shattuck Ave and Center Ave take UC Berkeley shuttle bus (7am-6pm weekdays); ask driver to take you to Cory

m weekdays); ask driver to take you to Cory Hall; http://public-safety.berkeley.edu/p&t/transit.html From airports and other campuses: http://public-safety.berkeley.edu/p&t/ By car from I-80: from I-880 in Berkeley, take University Ave exit go

rom I-880 in Berkeley, take University Ave exit go east on University Ave, go about 2 miles to end turn left onto Oxford St, go about 2 blocks turn right onto Hearst Ave, go about 0.5 miles turn left onto Gayley Ave, go about 2 blocks turn right into

onto Gayley Ave, go about 2 blocks turn right into "East Gate" parking area By car from Caldacott Tunnel: from Rt 24, take exit for Rt 13 to Berkeley Rt 13 is also called Tunnel Road go past Claremont Hotel (on the right) at traffic light, go left on

Hotel (on the right) at traffic light, go left onto Claremont Ave, bear left onto Belrose Ave bear left onto Derby St at stop sign, turn right onto Waring St go past Clark Kerr Campus (on right), bear left onto Piedmont Ave. go past International Ho

r left onto Piedmont Ave. go past International House and stadium (both on right) Piedmont Ave. becomes Gayley Rd. look for "East Gate" on left about 1/3 mile past stadium At the East Gate booth, stop at parking attendant, tell them your name and wh
